understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem (+) by navigating through the tile grid while avoiding hazards (spikes).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts x by 1 then gravity pulls (toward lower y if DOWN, higher y if UP) until landing on a solid tile or hazard. CLICK removes a breakable/clickable tile at target_position to open a path, without consuming movement steps. Hazards kill on landing; gravity direction persists until changed (not shown here). UNDO reverts the last action.
